title: poa effusa
intro: Poa effusa, also known as blue fescue grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family, Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Poa effusa lie in its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce stress and anxiety. Poa effusa can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion to harness its medicinal properties and is often used in traditional medicine.
